headline: Lululemon Is A Dog, No Matter Who Runs It
summary: When there is a fight over control of a public company, one would hope the winner would drive change and, with it, raise the stock price. That has not worked at Lululemon. The real problem is that its business model is fundamentally flawed. As the founder of Lululemon and the current management fight over control, ... Lululemon Is A Dog, No Matter Who Runs It

headline: Lululemon Speaks Out Against Its  Founder, Calling Him ‘Misguided’ and His Ideas ‘Outdated’
summary: For the first time, the company is publicly firing back at its founder — and urging shareholders to reject his board takeover.

headline: Lululemon Founder Fight Heads to Shareholder Vote
summary: Retailer urges investors to back its board nominees before June 25 meeting.

headline: Lululemon urges shareholders to back board nominees over Wilson’s ‘protests’
summary: Lululemon founder Chip Wilson says he is still willing to find a swift resolution to the messy proxy battle between him and the company, hours after Lululemon urged its shareholders to back its new board nominees, saying Wilson's views were "outdated”.

headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stock to Target This Week and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: Wall Street has set ambitious price targets for the stocks in this article. While this suggests attractive upside potential, it’s important to remain skeptical because analysts face institutional pressures that can sometimes lead to overly optimistic forecasts.
